subcodes.first_line: O thou endowed with inner sight! The eye hath gained vision, and the mystery of existence hath become manifest and evident. The hidden secret is now clear and unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دل آگاها دیده بینا شد و سر وجود مشهود و عیان گردید رمز مصون واضح و آشکار گشت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transmutation of the soul by the divine elixir
